calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And For Construction Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Little for Wells Fargo Bank.

Mr. Little stated that he is not aware of any objections and that he has not heard from anyone one way or the other. The Court noted that there is no notice to the Archdiocese, but that it does not affect their interest at all. Mr. Little stated that they did not provide notice to the Diocese because the $50,000.00 was characterized as a pledge and that it is the Trustee's intent to honor it. In light of the fact that the pledge will be honored, the Court granted the Petition for Instructions and for Construction of Trust Instrument (order signed in open Court).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
